chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-1549 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections 2. For hearing of CMA No.6548/2023 3. For hearing of main case. 07.11.2023 Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Addl. PG Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, AAG along with Sl Rabnawaz of P.S Setharja and Sl Jameel Ahmed on behalf of SSP Khairpur Learned Addl. PG has filed comments along with certain documents on behalf of Respondents No.2, 3 & 4, which are taken on record; a copy whereof has been supplied to learned Counsel for the Petitioners. SI/IO Rabnawaz has recorded statement of Petitioner No.l, who is complainant. She submits that under the coercion and influence from local waderas, she had registered FIR vide Crime No.26/2023 for offences punishable under Section 376/2, 365, 506/2 PPC at P.S Setharja, against her husband and others otherwise as a matter of fact she was not abducted by anyone, and had contracted marriage with Petitioner No.2 Asif Ali from whom she has a son namely Aiman Ali, aged about one year, who is also present in Court. Sl/ 10 states that in the light of statement of petitioner, he would dispose of the case and submit such report before concerned trial Court for orders. Counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. As and when report regarding disposing of the case is received, trial Court shall pass order in accordance with law on the basis of recommendation of Investigation Officer. JUDGE JUDGE Faisal Mumtaz/PS
